title: Hard polymeric porous microneedles on stretchable substrate for transdermal drug delivery.

formulations.evidence_snippet: The release profile of Ibuprofen from the microneedle patches in an attempt to quantify the amount released in vitro.
Samples collected at 30 minutes showed 12.4 mg of Ibuprofen released from the microneedle patches.
By 1 hour, the cumulative release of Ibuprofen reached 18.3 mg from the microneedles.
At the 90-minute mark, the total cumulative Ibuprofen released reached 23.7 mg.
After 2 hours, the patches delivered a total of 31.0 mg of Ibuprofen.
